title: Buildifier Configuration
description: Configuration file for Buildifier Bazel/Starlark formatter (.buildifier.json)

warnings.description: Comma-separated list of warning identifiers to enable/disable

warningsList.description: Warning identifiers as an array (alternative to warnings string)

recursive.description: Find Starlark files recursively in directories

multiDiff.description: Whether the diff command supports multiple files

tables.description: Path to JSON file with custom table definitions (replaces built-in tables)

addTables.description: Path to JSON file with custom table definitions (merges with built-in tables)

path.description: Assume the BUILD file has this path relative to the workspace directory

buildifier_disable.description: List of buildifier rewrites to disable

allowsort.description: Additional sort contexts to treat as safe for sorting
